case_title: SEMENOV, KIRILL VS GARY WILSON DBA A1 MASTER CLEANERS.

docket_entries.description: RULING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT SENT TO GARY WILSON DBA A1 MASTER CLEANERS RETURNED--NO DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SEMENOV, KIRILL AS TO DEFENDANT GARY WILSON DBA A1 MASTER CLEANERS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
